caption: One yearly license for unlimited projects, with the creators a message away: 4-hour priority response, quarterly editor onboarding, and a custom preset review. Pay yearly and save €298 versus monthly billing.

highlights.text: Everything in Pro for unlimited projects — guaranteed updates, early access, priority answers
Direct line to the maintainers with a 4-hour priority response
Founding customers: 20% off the first year with code DESIDERIO20
